techcrunch.title: Mobileye CEO Amnon Shashua to step aside as company pushes into robotaxis, robotics
techcrunch.description: Shashua has been invited to take the chairman of the board seat.

techcrunch.title: AMD takes on Nvidia with its Helios AI rack-scale system
techcrunch.description: AMD is challenging its chipmaker rival with a new rack-scale system that will start shipping to customers later this year.

techcrunch.title: Patreon lays off 20% of its workforce
techcrunch.description: In a memo to staff that was posted online, Conte said the company's core business is strong, but the platform has to respond to market changes and adjust its cost structure to remain stable.

techcrunch.title: Insurance startup Corgi reportedly raised more money at $4B — its third round in 8 weeks
techcrunch.description: In the AI-funding frenzy, many startups are raising back-to-back rounds at ever-increasing valuations — but even by those standards, Corgi stands out.

techcrunch.title: Tesla’s door handles may spur new US safety rules
techcrunch.description: The new rule-making process follows a series of incidents, including fatal ones, in which people have become stuck inside cars.

techcrunch.title: Meta drops out of a major clean energy pact as its natural gas buildout accelerates
techcrunch.description: Meta has made significant investments in natural gas over the past year. Now it's dropping out of an industry renewable energy group.

techcrunch.title: Anthropic updates Claude voice mode with more capable models
techcrunch.description: Claude's new voice model will let you reschedule your meeting or draft an email.

techcrunch.title: AegisAI, founded by former Google security execs, lands $36M to stop AI-driven spear phishing
techcrunch.description: AegisAI co-founders developed AI agents that quickly analyze each message as a human would, paying attention to small anomalies that even the most elaborate checklist wouldn’t catch.

techcrunch.title: US government says Iran-linked hackers are disrupting American water and energy providers
techcrunch.description: An updated government advisory warns that Iranian hackers are exploiting systems used by water and energy providers.

techcrunch.title: Runway launches AI model router as generative media gets crowded
techcrunch.description: The Media Router is a tool that automatically selects the best image, video, or audio generation model for a request based on whether a developer prioritizes quality, speed or cost.

techcrunch.title: OpenAI makes ChatGPT Health available to all US users
techcrunch.description: Users can also integrate their personal data from services like Apple Health, Function, and MyFitnessPal.

techcrunch.title: Tesla’s robotaxis are moving in reverse
techcrunch.description: The number of paid robotaxi miles traveled fell 36% in the second quarter, despite expanding to new cities, according to Tesla's own figures.

techcrunch.title: Meta launched a new AI optimism ad set to a song about human extinction
techcrunch.description: David Bowie's song "Five Years," which Meta used in a supposedly inspiring advertisement, is about humans learning that they have five years left to live before the apocalypse.

techcrunch.title: Google will now let you sign in to your account with a selfie video
techcrunch.description: The tech giant says selfie videos give users more options to sign in if they're ever locked out or don't have access to their usual phone or computer.

techcrunch.title: AI chip startup Etched defies skeptics, hits $10.3B valuation from big-name investors
techcrunch.description: Etched, founded by three Harvard dropouts, has created new chips and memory components that speed up inference on any AI model -- no GPUs required, it says.

techcrunch.title: Edtech platform raises $4.5M to help teach students how to vibe code
techcrunch.description: Imagi announced a $4.5 million seed round, with investors including Brighteye Ventures, Day One Capital, and artist Will.i.am.

techcrunch.title: Nvidia is sending GPUs to the moon
techcrunch.description: If there's a place in the universe without GPUs, Nvidia is sending them there.

techcrunch.title: Google’s Gemini nears billion-user milestone
techcrunch.description: Gemini had over 750 million monthly users in February.

techcrunch.title: Amazon is bringing games to Prime Video
techcrunch.description: Amazon is hoping the addition of games can turn Prime Video into a one-stop entertainment destination.

techcrunch.title: MeBeMe’s new ‘interrupter’ app helps you become your best self instead of doomscrolling
techcrunch.description: MeBeMe delivers small tasks to help users become their best selves instead of endlessly scrolling.
